content: Hey guys! I need help with building a team lineup, I need help since im a newcomerr <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Seeing as the upcoming anni will have a daily rotating banner i'm wondering who i should get compared to have i have rn?

I know for sure that i'll get 1 Thais but other than that i'm not sure
I'll have around 600 pulls to play with for reference :D
just good units and wheels
see my new player handbook
I have it open constantly dw, but that would mean that going for mouchette would not be a bad idea either? Since u need like 5 teams for an endgame mode i heard
the thing about the echoing wishes banner is
it randomly gives either the unit or the wheel
you cant choose
so you have to be ok with getting either
the 3 units i suggested also have op wheels
so its fine if you miss a few times
mouchette wheel is only good on a highly invested mouchette
useless on any other character
i seeeee
i'm pretty sure i heard it also be catered towards wheel
like 33/66
You can just lose the 50/50 twice in a row
ah right
Wait
so it's 50/50 to be on banner / offbanner
then a50/50 between character and wod
33/66 for rate up
Then 50/50 for char/wod
i see
hey that's not that bad
(it's horrible)
I'll prolly just try to get e0 thais and e0 horla
It's ok
I would actually prioritize this banner over normal rerun banners (like Clem)
Do explain
Her wheel is fine. If you lose to the wheel, it's not the end of the world. If you win the char, you get it early because you only need to lose 1 pity instead of 2
But couldn't i theoretically go forever without getting the character
if i always go to 90 pulls and always get the wod
This banner only goes to 60, that's the advantage
Okay 60, still
And after losing to wheel twice, third time is always a char
For instance
AHh
so 180
very very worst case
Yes
It's like
If for instance, you want both Clem and her Wod
Assuming you hit pity
You pull on her regular rerun, you spend 90 + 60 to get both
If you pull on the new banner, and get char, you spent 60 pulls
Now you can pull on the rerun wod banner, and get both at 60+60 pulls
If you lose and get the wod on this banner instead, you spent 60 pulls
humu humu
You can now go and get the char on the normal rerun banner with 90 pulls, still 60+90
So it's scam-ish
You didn't actually lose anything
And if you win, you save pulls
But that's only IF you want both char and wod
I see

okay well i really wanna make my (bear with me here idk if this is ridiculous to say)
But i wanna run Ghelot thais horla and arachne
i don't have horla or thais
i have ghelot e3 no sig wod and arachne e0 with her wod
how much would i need of the other 2 and do i really need their wod
Thais really wants E2, but I wouldn't go for dupes on this banner. Use monthly dupes on her if needed
Oooh rtight
i can use the prototype thingy
Horla doesn't really need her WoD, but it's good general purpose
i might have accidentally listened to a flares vid and used one on caecus
oopsie
but i have one extra
Don't listen to flares, his advice and mindset is quite outdated
yeah i realised
cheri filled me in on that

Because it's super fun
fym best in the game 😭 there's no way the cheri line was actually true

without looking online
Yeah, should work fine in general
Idk, I find the in-game stuff quite unintuitive with too many menus and info scattered all over, I prefer looking online

+2 hand limit
keyflare at turn end
ailmeus
embryo
wtf it does everything

okay i'll be pulling for thais + wod that's already set
Aliemus, weakness, vuln, embryo, card dupe, ap cost reduction, etc
and i'll have 2 prototypes by then
so i could probably get her e2
Yeah
Do if realm checks work if it's dual realm
Horla is fine E0, better at E1 but not a top priority on that comp imo
Wdym? All those chars are from Caro and Ultra

or can it be caroultra
Yes it's fine
okay perfect
Thanks so much for the help
this game is kinda confusing sometimes
